title: Absent by Design
description: Adds models and code for the blocks; adds zero textures.  The mod pulls textures from the relevant source block.  It can be overriden with reosurcepacks as normal.       Compatible with all resource packs.
body:
Adds models and code for the blocks; adds zero textures.  The mod pulls textures from the relevant source block.  It can be overriden with reosurcepacks as normal.  


Compatible with all resource packs.
 



[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-F16436?style=flat-square&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/absent-by-design)
